title: leontodon glaberrimus
intro: Leontodon glaberrimus, also known as smooth hawk's beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Leontodon glaberrimus typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
